modus_invocation.promotion: only after baseline/null and runtime trace

tools_custom.name: btc_market_card
tools_custom.boundary: writes observe-only BTC data-card; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false

tools_custom.name: btc_exchange_ohlcv
tools_custom.boundary: writes exchange-native OHLCV robustness data-card across Bitstamp/Coinbase/Binance; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false

tools_custom.name: btc_first_hypothesis
tools_custom.boundary: consumes exchange OHLCV artifact and writes first falsifiable BTC hypothesis card; field admissibility only; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false

tools_custom.name: btc_timeframe_matrix
tools_custom.boundary: consumes BTC field artifacts and classifies requested timeframes as testable, watch-only or blocked; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false

tools_custom.name: btc_method_intake_card
tools_custom.boundary: turns Alipio/Rea BTC method language into method cards, missing definitions, THIA questions and next-test contracts; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false

tools_custom.name: btc_daily_inefficiency_candidate
tools_custom.boundary: consumes exchange OHLCV artifact and writes daily FVG/inefficiency proxy zones with matched adjacent controls; public_claim=false; trading_signal=false; operational=false
